channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: LIRR strike: Key details on the rail workers' walkout
item.description: For the first time in 32 years, thousands of New Yorkers face a workweek without the Long Island Railroad after workers walked off the job.

item.title: Trump warns Iran: 'Clock is ticking' as fragile ceasefire holds
item.description: President Trump said Iran will face destruction if its leaders do not act quickly.

item.title: Pepper spray used at watch release events
item.description: Police intervened to break up fights among shoppers at limited-edition watch collaboration events between Swatch and Audemars Piguet in Milan.

item.title: Iran live updates: Trump says time is critical for nuclear deal
item.description: President Donald Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on Feb. 28, with large joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.
